Argument Reference

  • auto_tiering - (Optional) (Updatable) Configure auto tiering for the bucket.
  • compartment_id - (Optional) (Updatable) Move the bucket to a different compartment.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the bucket.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the bucket.
  • kms_key_id - (Optional) (Updatable) KMS key used by the bucket.
  • metadata - (Optional) (Updatable) User-defined metadata for the bucket.
  • name - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • namespace - (Optional) This field cannot be updated after creation.
  • object_events_enabled - (Optional) (Updatable) Emit events for object state changes.
  • public_access_type - (Optional) (Updatable) Public access mode for the bucket.
  • versioning - (Optional) (Updatable) Versioning state for the bucket.
